_comment: This file shows TWO marketplaces side-by-side as separate JSON objects under _stable and _latest. Each one is a valid marketplace.json on its own — split into two repos (or two refs of one repo) when you actually publish. Each plugin must resolve to a different version per channel; either the refs declare different `version` values in their plugin.json, or you omit `version` entirely and rely on the distinct commit SHAs.
